_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of age and neurofibromatosis type 1 status on white matter integrity in the optic radiations.

_contextSnippet: In a sensitivity analysis, scans in which optic radiation tracts overlapped with areas of signal abnormality seen on b = 0 maps were excluded and similar logarithmic relationships between DTI measures and age were found
details: Successfully tracked optic radiation tracts in all 93 participants, with sensitivity analysis showing similar logarithmic relationships between DTI measures and age even when excluding scans with signal abnormalities
